channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: HSBC shares drop as first-quarter pre-tax profit misses estimates on higher expected credit losses
item.description: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.

item.title: Iran attacks UAE; U.S. says it sank boats in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Stock market indices fell, and oil prices rose after the reported attack on the United Arab Emirates by Iran, which came nearly a month into a ceasefire.

item.title: Pirro changes course in Fed investigation, move unlikely to satisfy Powell
item.description: The U.S. attorney opted not to appeal a ruling that had blocked her subpoenas to the Fed.

item.title: American pilots union chief says United CEO's merger idea showed 'bold vision'
item.description: United said last month it had ended its pursuit of a merger with American after the rival carrier declined to engage following an initial approach.

item.title: This AI dark horse sector keeps winning. Stick with the trade, analyst says
item.description: The story for this sector is that 'winners keep winning,' Wolfe analyst Steve Fleishman said.

item.title: Australia hikes rates again and warns inflation will stay higher for longer
item.description: Inflation had picked up materially in the second half of 2025, and the conflict in the Middle East had resulted in sharply higher fuel and commodity prices.

item.title: European stocks set to open lower as Iran war concerns grow
item.description: European stocks are expected to open lower on Tuesday as investors digest the latest developments in the Iran war.

item.title: Oil slides as traders assess Middle East developments with Iran attacks keeping markets jittery
item.description: Oil prices declined on Tuesday, retreating from sharp gains in the previous session.

item.title: BYD's passenger EV sales drop for an eighth month as competition heats up
item.description: BYD's deliveries fell for an eighth straight month in April, while Stellantis-backed Leapmotor logged a record number of deliveries

item.title: CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026: The league has its first $1 billion team
item.description: The average value of a Women's National Basketball Association team is $460 million, according to CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026.

item.title: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' kicks off summer movie season in style with $77 million opening
item.description: Disney and 20th Century Studios' "The Devil Wears Prada 2" opened the summer movie season with $77 million in ticket sales.

item.title: Trump said $465,000 in retirement savings is 'rich.' Is it?
item.description: President Donald Trump said savers who build a $465,000 nest egg would be "rich." Whether that's true depends on one's perception of wealth.

item.title: U.S. military denies Iran's claim it struck American warship in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has blocked tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz since the U.S. and Israel started the war in late February, resulting in supply and price shocks.

item.title: Andy Jassy says Amazon investors will be rewarded by all its AI spending
item.description: CEO Andy Jassy said Amazon’s massive AI spending reflects a once-in-a-generation opportunity and will ultimately reward investors.

item.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: China is rewiring the Silicon Valley model — starting in Hong Kong
item.description: Hong Kong's IPO surge looks to be just getting started, as China's tech boom sees its ecosystem mature.

item.title: Secret Service officer arrested for indecent exposure in Miami after Trump golf event
item.description: Secret Service Officer John Spillman has been placed on administrative leave after his arrest, which in Miami.

item.title: OpenAI sales leader leaves for role at Thrive Capital
item.description: James Dyett joined OpenAI in 2023, shortly after the company underwent a period of explosive growth with the launch of its ChatGPT chatbot.

item.title: Palantir tops estimates on 85% revenue growth, fastest expansion since market debut in 2020
item.description: Palantir reported better-than-expected revenue and profit, driven by growth in sales to U.S. government agencies.

item.title: World Cup prize pool nears $900 million as FIFA boosts payouts. Here’s who gets what
item.description: FIFA's upcoming World Cup is set to be the most lucrative on-record, with a 'record breaking' prize pool on offer, as FIFA shrugs off other controversies.

item.title: Spirit Airlines CEO on carrier's collapse: 'We just kind of ran out of runway'
item.description: Spirit Airlines shut down before dawn on Saturday ending its run as the most famous U.S. discount airline.

item.title: What's behind Eli Lilly's down-and-up day after last week's post-earnings surge
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: CNBC Points Pro: How do I upgrade from economy to first class with credit card points?
item.description: Points expert Jason Stauffer explains what to consider if you want to upgrade your flight with points or miles.

item.title: Pinterest surges 15% after earnings beat as company posts strong guidance
item.description: Pinterest cut nearly 15% of its workforce and reduced office space in January as it pushes more resources into AI.

item.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The major averages sold off on Monday, with the Dow Industrials losing more than 550 points as oil prices rose and investors grew worried about the Middle East.

item.title: SEC and Elon Musk agree to settle lawsuit over Twitter buyout in 2022
item.description: The SEC and Elon Musk agreed to settle a lawsuit filed by the regulator last year against the world's richest person.

item.title: Paramount earnings, revenue beat expectations as streaming business offers a boost
item.description: Paramount Skydance said it added streaming subscribers during the first quarter even as it instituted its first price hike since 2024.

item.title: Top Democrat aims for New York redistricting after Supreme Court’s Voting Rights ruling
item.description: Democrats are vowing to fight back after the Supreme Court eliminated a majority-Black Louisiana House district, as more states look to redraw maps.

item.title: Musk texted OpenAI's Brockman about settlement two days before trial began
item.description: Elon Musk co-founded OpenAI in 2015 and sued the company, President Greg Brockman and CEO Sam Altman in 2024.

item.title: Ryan Cohen makes a longshot run at eBay. Analysts see little chance GameStop can pull it off
item.description: One eBay owner said that it's "disconcerting to pump and dump, if that is how it plays out."

item.title: Traders are doubtful Cohen's GameStop can pull off monster eBay acquisition
item.description: Traders on Kalshi and Polymarket give the company just a 25% and 15% chance, respectively, of successfully buying the online marketplace.
